ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent */,
  "is_home" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game was played at home */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.) */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win, loss, overtime loss, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opposing team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the opposing team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "toi" REAL /* Time On Ice */,
  "ozs" INTEGER /* Offensive Zone Starts */,
  "nzs" INTEGER /* Neutral Zone Starts */,
  "dzs" INTEGER /* Defensive Zone Starts */,
  "otf" INTEGER /* Offensive Zone Face-offs */,
  "ozf" INTEGER /* Offensive Zone Face-offs */,
  "nzf" INTEGER /* Neutral Zone Face-offs */,
  "dzf" INTEGER /* Defensive Zone Face-offs */,
  "ice_f" INTEGER /* Ice Time Forwards */,
  "ice_a" INTEGER /* Ice Time Against */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals scored against the team */,
  "shots_for" INTEGER /* Shots on goal by the team */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Shots on goal against the team */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (Head Coach, Assistant Coach, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (Trainer, Equipment Manager, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the game was played at home
